programme.title: Addams Family 133
programme.desc: Addams Family 133

programme.title: Love Boat
programme.desc: Merrills marooned group faces the hurricane while Isaac tries to help the passengers and regain Maras trust Jean gets a surprise while prepping to meet her birth mother

programme.title: Daktari 215
programme.desc: Daktari 215

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: When a prostitute is murdered one of Jennifers former sources asks her to investigate

programme.title: Cagney and Lacy
programme.desc: The gang from the 14th precinct are robbed at a celebration for Petries promotion and set out to bring the perpetrators to justice before they become the laughingstock of the NYPD

programme.title: Starsky 301
programme.desc: Starsky 301

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: Hawke reluctantly agrees with amused Dominic to be hired by cocky Israeli Nazi-hunter Sarah Lebow who seeks revenge on former Dachau camp commandant Helmut Krüger who turned the tables by killing her father under the pseudonym Hans Daubert Hes now an international arms dealer with a fortified estate in Paraguay Archangel strongly advises against meddling with him but fails to holding back the Santini Air team who fields Airwolf risking a confrontation with the prime weapon system on auction right then US quadruple anti-aircraft missile system Thor Archangel gets involved being Krügers main supplier as Hawke suspects with a brilliant patriotic agenda but Sarah stops at nothing - several duels are inevitable

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki and Ryan investigate the murder of a gym owner and realize that a mysterious pair of boxing gloves may be to blame

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First Frankie and Lyndah find themselves in a fancy neighborhood dealing with a pair of uptight yuppies with well-coordinated clothes and well-coordinated attacks Then Lyndah goes wild when a truck-driving debtor gets physical with Sonia And finally Matt and Froy face down a backwoods Texan with secret ammunition TV-14-LV

programme.title: Petticoat Junction S05E26
programme.desc: Petticoat Junction S05E26

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa and Luke jeopardize Kates chances to be named to a church committee when they unwittingly allow a Las Vegas gambling house to advertise on the McCoys barn

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Much to Grampas consternation George wants to join a private club known as the Loyal Order of the Mystic Nile

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Kay inherits country property in New York so Roger enters into an agreement to sell their California home and move The purchaser who works for the IRS threatens to sue the Posts if their behavior is not to is liking

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Ed is suffering from feelings of rejection so he moves to the beach to live with a group of outcast beatniks Roger owns the beach property and he wants to evict the whole lot of them

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: In Micahs absence Lucas is forced into a duel to determine to which system of justice the blatant murder of a rural Hispanic resident applies the old justice of traditional New Mexico Hispanics administered by Baranca or the US law

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A Cavalry captain discovers that a son has been an outlaw who was killed by Lucas He is determined to punish Lucas for the tragedy

programme.desc: Gunsmoke S10E06 Take Her Shes Cheap

programme.title: Bonanza 301
programme.desc: Bonanza 301

programme.desc: Micki waits tables in a seedy bar in an attempt to retrieve a cursed pool cue that enables the owner to win every game

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.title: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Freddy harasses a young medical student on Halloween night driving her to the brink of madness and beyond

programme.title: Tales From the Crypt
programme.desc: Tales From the Crypt

programme.title: Tales From the Crypt
programme.desc: Tales From the Crypt

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A stressed out bank employee begins having premonitions concerning a serial killer who could be any one of the men in her life

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Sweet singer Miranda and her musician partner Sean are a couple of struggling songwriters who are trying desperately to break into the rock music business Miranda creates a sexy new image for herself in order to achieve the fame and success she desires However Miranda winds up paying an extremely heavy spiritual price because of said sexy image

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric locates Otto Renfield a crippled old sailor who knows Skorzeny and promises to help Eric find him But Renfield betrays Eric and traps him in the hold of his ship for Skorzeny

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks help from college professor Dr Victor Degoethels who has written a book about werewolves throughout the ages But Alamo Joe has already warned him about Eric and his crimes

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: A pop radio psychiatrist is horrified because one of her call-in listeners commits murder while she is on the air and Nick helps her get her confidence back

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Ryan and Micki investigate the apparent suicides of a handful of ballet dancers and soon learn that they may be linked to a rare music box

programme.title: Hogans 319
programme.desc: Hogans 319

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Virgil loses the 73 and McHale and The Crew must arrange for a replacement before they can take a weeks RR trip to New Caledonia

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: McHale and The 73 Crew avert an attack on a Navy convoy by employing a clever plan involving John Wayne Humphrey Bogart and Errol Flynn

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carter asks Gomer to take his place on a date

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carters adopted Korean daughter arrives-but shes not the little girl he remembers

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways desperately try to find a new water source as they have completely exhausted their current water supply

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A Japanese soldier arrives on the island thinks its still WWII and holds the castaways prisoner on their own island

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa has a cold but he doesnt trust the new doctor - or any doctor for that matter

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: After Grampa refuses to give him a raise Pepino quits and goes to work for neighbor George MacMichael

programme.title: Smart 526
programme.desc: Smart 526

programme.title: Smart 227
programme.desc: Smart 227

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ Callie and Stacks help BJs old friend Steven Thomas Ulysses Nathaniel Travis complete the filming of his television pilot Buster Crabbe is outstanding as an aging stuntman with a secret

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: The wives horn in on Wilbur and Rogers duck hunting trip

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Rogers brother-in-law is begging Wilbur to write a follow-up hit song to Pretty Little Filly He wants it to be a blues number so Wilbur does his best to get Ed in a depressed mood

programme.title: Hogans 312
programme.desc: Hogans 312

programme.title: Love Boat
programme.desc: The Amazing Alonzo performs illusions for his fans while neglecting gal pal Ramona Dr Diller and his wife dont know that their son Bobby lies to get attention Julies friend Karen has facial scars after an accident and is insecure

programme.title: WKRP 211
programme.desc: WKRP 211

programme.title: WKRP 208
programme.desc: WKRP 208

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Whilst Evan is babysitting baby Emily he accidentally loses her

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Wood Ava Taylor his girlfriend Amy Harlon Marlene Hermon and Fida take a road trip in an RV

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: Vega

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: The Harts look forward to lunch with Jennifers friend Marcie and her new spouse Adam Fowler who vanishes and is soon found dead Meanwhile two men who followed him out of the restaurant trail who they think is his wife Jennifer

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Stephanie is desperate to win back Michael after he dumps her first by belittling his new girlfriend Susan and then by taking lessons in being nice from George

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Larry feels abandoned after Darryl and Darryl begin spending all their time with a new friend

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: Elizabeth gets Gunny to teach her the investment system she uses since Gunny makes so much money in the commodities market but after some unexpected weather they all loose the money

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: verybody wants a piece of Gilligan and his newfound riches after he wins a three million dollar bet with Mr Howell

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Mitchs former rival Albert Romero from the Baywatch episode Red Wind suddenly shows up and asks Mitch and Garner to help him search for his wife Bobbie who he believes was kidnapped by the Mafia

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Froy meets with a lawyer but his legal troubles are worse than expected Sonia and Froy confront a debtor who uses a homeless man in his ploy to keep his car Then Sonia and Froy discover one debtors alcoholism is only a farce to cover a bigger secret And finally the teams attempt to repo fifteen bikes from a gym is not the morale booster Lou had hoped for

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The Alphans encounter an eccentric and intelligent robot who is known as Brian the Brain Brians creator Captain Michael and his crew have all died in mysterious circumstances and Brian asks for the help of Koenig and his crew However it soon becomes very apparent that Brian is anything but harmless and was in fact responsible for the deaths of Captain Michael and his colleagues And he is ready to do the same to the Alphans unless they supply him with enough nuclear fuel to sustain him forever

programme.title: The Midnight Hour
programme.desc: Teenage Halloween pranksters Shari Belafonte-Harper LeVar Burton Lee Montgomery revive a 300-year-old witch and some of her ghoul friends

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Bo and Luke learn that their artist friend Grannie Annie is the mastermind behind a small-time counterfeiting ring After her arrest Boss seizes the engraving plates to sell to no-nonsense counterfeiter Big John Downey Bo and Luke work to clear Annies name unaware that their efforts may have deadly consequences for Boss

programme.title: Hercules 218
programme.desc: Hercules 218

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: A new inter-dimensional portal system for human travel turns out to be something more when the resistance discover a CVI in a boy who got lost in the system

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: A noted scientist and old friend of Suzannes Dr Erik Von Deer is being brain-washed through signals subliminally implanted in the music of his favorite artist into secretly working on a serum that will give the aliens immunity to Earths bacteria Suzanne arrives for a weekend visit while Von Deer is on the verge of the serums completion

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcanes sonic experiment designed to kill Alec cross-fires and turns him into his opposite - a kind generous considerate man horrified at his treatment of Alec However if he can stop the experiment it may change him b

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Will becomes involved with a couple who hold a map that Arcane has a keen interest in obtaining

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The tall and imposing Magus arrives on board the ship He claims godlike powers namely that he effected the Creation But he is now disillusioned with the way that Life has progressed and wishes to start again He plans to mate Helena and Tony and Maya with Koenig But of course he is not God but a renegade cosmic sorcerer and quite illogical at that who needs to be controlled

programme.title: The Fugitive S02E24
programme.desc: The Fugitive S02E24

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: The once friendly annual rodeo between the Barkley and Morton ranches has become a nasty win-at-all-costs event An ex-slave super cowboy raises the stakes when he agrees to compete for the Barkleys

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne must fight a Comanche Indian chief in swallowing sand to save a wagon load of people who banded together under various circumstances They are stranded with no hope of rescue or supplies First one who yells out for help loses

programme.desc: Four men plan to heist radioactive gold over a poker game Then find out that it is mixed with UraniumThe man smelting and forming the planchets gets radiation poisoning and it goes down hill for them fast

programme.desc: The exact rendering of a map is duplicated in order to fool a female spy Its the second part of an overlay that details NATOs missile defense system

programme.title: Revenge of the Ninja
programme.desc: A Japanese gallery owner denies his violent ninja heritage until American drug traffickers kidnap his young son

programme.title: Hellbound
programme.desc: Two Chicago cops Chuck Norris Calvin Levels investigate a murder until they encounter an ancient demon

programme.title: The Retriever
programme.desc: A martial artist Max Thayer flees with an ex-agents manuscript and sister Shawn Hoskins while on a mission for the CIA

programme.title: Bionic Ever After
programme.desc: Steve Austin and Jaime Summers are about to get married However before they can something is happening to Jaime It seems like her bionics are failing and no one knows whats wrong with her It seems that someone has been doing something to her who and why At the same time an old friend of Steves is being held prisoner by some terrorists and Steve needing to take his mind off Jaime offers to go and help

programme.title: No Retreat No Surrender
programme.desc: After his father is abused by some thugs a teenager considers Bruce Lees spirit as his teacher Later he trains to become a martial arts professional to avenge his fathers humiliation

programme.title: The Gladiator
programme.desc: A homicidal maniac is on the loose in Los Angeles killing motorists at random with his death car After losing his brother Jeff to the twisted assassin known as Skull Rick Benton takes it upon himself to hunt down the reckless drivers that fill the streets at night Being a master mechanic Rick spends his time converting his pick-up truck into an armed and dangerous vehicle With speed to take on the fastest car and strength to make sure in a one-on-one situation he will be the only survivor The cops soon find out about the vigilante known only as the Gladiator and do all they can to catch him before his citizens arrests go one step too far

programme.title: The Hitman
programme.desc: A Cop goes undercover as a Hitman to bring down a criminal organization

programme.title: Billionaire Boys Club
programme.desc: Ron Levin a wealthy businessman has disappeared No body is found but there was a list with instructions in his house - a recipe for murder Its author Joe Hunt is the defendant The successful young business man had formed a team of prestigious former fellow students for a risky project which should make them all rich His partners claim they didnt know about the means

programme.title: Mazes and Monsters
programme.desc: Four college students become immersed in fantasy role-playing games causing tragic results; based on Rona Jaffes book

programme.title: Bionic Ever After
programme.desc: Steve Austin and Jaime Summers are about to get married However before they can something is happening to Jaime It seems like her bionics are failing and no one knows whats wrong with her It seems that someone has been doing something to her who and why At the same time an old friend of Steves is being held prisoner by some terrorists and Steve needing to take his mind off Jaime offers to go and help

programme.desc: Ryan and Micki investigate the apparent suicides of a handful of ballet dancers and soon learn that they may be linked to a rare music box

programme.title: House II The Second Story
programme.desc: A man Arye Gross and his friend Jonathan Stark exhume an ancestor Royal Dano in the house where his parents were killed

programme.title: Howling V
programme.desc: A werewolf stalks an eclectic group of travellers on hand to attend the opening of a long-sealed European castle

programme.title: Children of the Corn
programme.desc: Two lovers stumble across a small American town where local children have killed the adult population in a bizarre ritual

programme.title: The Stuff
programme.desc: A delicious mysterious goo that oozes from the earth is marketed as the newest dessert sensation but the tasty treat rots more than teeth when zombie-like snackers who only want to consume more of the strange substance at any cost begin infesting the world

programme.title: Chopping Mall
programme.desc: A group of young shopping mall employees stay behind for a late night party in one of the stores When the mall goes on lock-down before they can get out the robot security system malfunctions and goes on a killing spree

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Athens, Greece on July 28, 2018, Karate Combat: Olympus is the second event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Held in the ancient Zappeion Courtyard where the first modern Olympic Games took place in 1896. On the Main Card: “Hurricane” Davy Dona of France versus Jerome “The Brown Bear” from the UK. The co-main event features Morocco’s Achraf Ouchen versus Ecuadorian Franklin Mina. Other fighters include Deivis Ferraras of Dominican Republic, Wellington Barbosa of Brazil, and Yaser Sahintekin of Turkey.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Milan Paleš v. Mohamed Didouh

programme.desc: Hitomi Akano v. Keiko Tamai

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The School of Hard Knocks 24 filmed at the Spectra Place in Estevan. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in the cage. programme.desc: Sherard sits down with the man who has turn comedy into an art

programme.title: The Heart Hayes Interview
programme.desc: Join me as I sit down with the beautiful actress Heart Hayes Hear how keeping her standards high is the only option Also in the episode I chat it up with former Supreme Susaye Green And Businessman Mr Johnboy Watts

programme.desc: Join me as the lovely Empress returns to the Sherard Show as a new mother and hit maker

programme.desc: Join me as I celebrate a milestone in life as well as on the show Featuring special guests Felix Mcnulty Jennifer Santos and the beautiful Irina Voornina

programme.desc: The lovely actress Annalisa stops by the show to talk about the dark side of being a female in the industry
